# Copilot Instructions

**Before making any changes to this codebase, you must read the `.harness` file in the root of this repository.**

The `.harness` file contains the full product specification, design rules, tech stack requirements, acceptance criteria, and implementation order for the MarketQuest project. All decisions — architecture, UI, database schema, features, and implementation order — must align with what is defined there.

Do not skip this step. Do not assume you already know the requirements. Read `.harness` first, every time.
